title: Performance Marketing Manager (all genders welcome)
missing_skills: Google Ads (Search, PMax, Display) hands-on management
Paid search campaign setup and ownership
core_responsibilities: Own and optimize paid media campaigns (Search, PMax, Display) end-to-end to drive customer acquisition
Collaborate with Platform team on web event tracking via Mixpanel and HubSpot
Build and optimize landing pages in Unbounce and WordPress to maximize conversion from paid traffic
Work with Sales team to target right industries and attract high-value decision-makers
Continuously improve campaign structure, targeting, and performance to capture high-intent B2B demand
recommended_emphasis: Highlight A/B and multivariate testing experience as it directly matches a required skill
Emphasize funnel and conversion analysis work to demonstrate alignment with conversion optimization responsibilities
Showcase any experience with marketing analytics tools (GA4, Mixpanel equivalents) even if under different names
Stress cross-functional collaboration with Sales or commercial teams to mirror the Sales Enablement requirement
Quantify campaign ROI and performance improvements to demonstrate data-driven mindset
Mention any paid media or SEM exposure, even in a supporting or analytical capacity
